mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS s_id, s.student_name AS student_name, s.course_id AS course_id, s.score AS score, s.semester AS semester, co.id AS co_id, co.name AS co_name, co.hours AS hours, co.teacher_id AS teacher_id, co.class_id AS class_id FROM score s LEFT JOIN course co ON s.course_id = co.id WHERE s.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY s.id

SELECT AVG(score) AS avg_score, MAX(score) AS max_score, MIN(score) AS min_score, SUM(CASE WHEN score IS NOT NULL AND score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass_count FROM score WHERE course_id = #{courseId}

insert.if:
INSERT INTO score (student_name, course_id, score, semester) VALUES
(#{item.studentName}, #{item.courseId}, #{item.score}, #{item.semester})
